JSyn      ----     Java Audio Synthesis API

What is JSyn?

  • Audio Synthesis API for Java by Phil Burk
  • Real-time audio synthesis using unit generators.
  • Synthesis performed in Java. Fast enough with HotSpot compiler. (June 2012)
  • API = Application Programmer Interface. Not an application, or a language.
  • Currently uses JavaSound for audio I/O. (June 2012)
  • Available at http://www.softsynth.com/jsyn

Why JSyn?

  • Allows computer music pieces to be placed in the web page for audience interaction.
  • Java is a very nice language for composition with support for GUI, networking, etc.
 [TOP]   [NEXT]

Visit the JSyn or SoftSynth home pages.
